name: Create account
description: Easy user registration with email verification. Get started in seconds and begin collaborating with your team right away.

name: Sign in with Email and Password
description: Secure authentication with email and password. Simple yet powerful login mechanism for all users.

name: Sign in with Magic link
description: Passwordless authentication via magic links. Send a secure link to users' email for instant access without remembering passwords.

name: Sign in with SAML SSO
description: Enterprise-grade single sign-on integration. Seamlessly integrate with your organization's identity provider.

name: Directory Sync (SCIM)
description: Automated user provisioning and management. Keep your team directory synchronized across all platforms in real-time.

name: Update account
description: Manage personal profile information and preferences. Keep your account details current and secure.

name: Invite users to the team
description: Send invitations to collaborators and expand your team. Control who joins your workspace with custom roles.

name: Manage team members
description: Add, remove, and organize team members effectively. View roles, permissions, and team activity in one place.

name: Update team settings
description: Configure team-wide settings and policies. Control billing, notifications, security, and workspace preferences.

name: Webhooks & Events
description: Real-time event streaming and webhook integrations. Connect your SaaS with external tools and automate workflows.

name: Create team
description: Establish new teams for different projects or departments. Organize your workspace with multiple independent teams.
